headline: Fed delivers surprise 25bp hike overnight; long-end yields jump
summary: An unscheduled policy statement lifted the target range by 25bp, citing sticky services inflation. Two- and ten-year yields gapped higher and rate-sensitive sectors sold off in pre-market.

headline: Bumper-harvest forecast sinks grain prices to a 3-year low
summary: Updated crop-condition data points to record yields, pressuring grain and feed margins. Ag lenders flagged near-term working-capital strain for cooperative borrowers.

headline: Quartzite Semiconductors cuts guidance; rating agency opens watch
summary: The chipmaker slashed full-year revenue guidance on soft data-center demand and was placed on negative credit watch. Holders of the name face mark-to-market and spread risk.

headline: Northstar Aerospace wins multi-year defense components contract
summary: A fictional prime awarded Northstar Aerospace a multi-year supply agreement, materially expanding its order book and likely lifting financing and treasury needs.

headline: Healthcare M&A wave lifts diagnostics and devices
summary: Two large fictional acquisitions re-rated the diagnostics and medical-device space higher, improving sentiment and valuations for sector borrowers and holdings.
